title: 2026 Quinceañera Packages
content: We have three packages for 2026: Essential, Classic, and Premiere. Whether you want full-service planning or just day-of coordination, we have you covered. Spots are limited — October and November dates are going fast.
excerpt: Our 2026 quinceañera packages are here. Book early — dates are filling up.

title: December Cookie Orders Open
content: Taking custom cookie orders for December events. Holiday designs, quinceañera favors, birthday sets. Order deadline is November 30. Message through the site or DM @momentosbychris on Instagram.
excerpt: December cookie orders are open. Deadline is November 30.

title: Camila Fuentes Quinceañera Recap
content: Camila's quinceañera at Las Palmas Banquet Hall was one for the books. Gold and blush theme, choreographed waltz with her chambelanes, and a cookie display that had guests talking all night. Photos by Carmen Davidson.
excerpt: A look back at Camila Fuentes's quinceañera at Las Palmas Banquet Hall.

title: Halloween Block Party Highlights
content: The apartment complex pool party turned out great. About 60 neighbors showed up. Carved about 20 pumpkins, ran a costume contest for the kids, and kept the music going until 10. Simple setup, good crowd.
excerpt: Recap of the Halloween block party at the apartment complex.

title: How to Choose a Quinceañera Venue in Las Vegas
content: Venue is the first thing you lock in. Capacity, parking, catering policy, and your date window — get those four answered before you tour anywhere. My go-to spots are Emerald Hall and Las Palmas Banquet Hall. Both have worked with me on timing and setup access.
excerpt: Practical advice for picking a quinceañera venue in Las Vegas.

title: Draft: Mariana Rodriguez Quinceañera Recap
content: Draft recap for Mariana's quinceañera at Emerald Hall on October 17. Photos still coming in from Carmen.

title: 5 Things That Make a Quinceañera Special
content: The dress gets all the attention, but the five things guests remember are the waltz, the last doll, the toast, the food, and how relaxed the family looked. That last one is what a good planner actually delivers.
excerpt: What guests remember long after the quinceañera is over.
